mapper.sql: id, job_title, company_name, city, work_address, education_text, experience_text, salary_text, salary_min, salary_max, job_description, publish_time, data_batch_no
mapper.select:
select from job_info
order by publish_time desc, id desc limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}
select from job_info where id = #{id} and status = 1 and job_description is not null and trim(job_description) != '' limit 1
select from job_info where status = 1 and job_description is not null and trim(job_description) != '' order by publish_time desc, id desc limit #{limit}
